days.text: Mainly cloudy. Showers, heavy at first. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 southwesterly winds with gusts.
